name: Cosmetics and personal care category overlay
change_note: Migrated from script CATEGORY_CHECKLIST into a composable category overlay.
checklist_hints: INCI ingredient list, claims, responsible person/local representative, safety assessment, and notification/registration needs are checked.
Sunscreen, acne, whitening, anti-dandruff, or therapeutic claims are routed for classification review.
GMP, microbiology, heavy metals, and preservative evidence are requested when relevant.
gaps: Seed overlay: verify destination-market cosmetics regulator requirements per case.
